hypothesis: If a closed-loop Gaussian process–based Bayesian optimizer adaptively selects bicarbonate temperature and concentration, KOH concentration and flow rates, and applied current density in a silver-catalyzed reactive carbon electrolyzer, then it will rapidly identify high-yield operating conditions that generalize to mixed bicarbonate–carbonate feeds because the model efficiently learns and exploits the high-dimensional, noisy response surface to prioritize informative experiments and key parameters.
